hero.title: Best Spa in Sakinaka, Andheri for Body Massage, Relaxation & Wellness
hero.description: Book a clean, private and professional spa experience with trained therapists, calming rooms, strong hygiene standards and quick WhatsApp appointment support.

services.title: Full Body Massage

services.title: Deep Tissue Massage

services.description: Popular spa styles for flexibility, stress relief and a luxury wellness experience in a private setup.

services.title: Head, Neck & Foot Massage
services.description: Short and effective massage options for office fatigue, travel tiredness and daily stress relief.

services.title: Facial & Body Care

sections.whyText: People searching for a spa in Sakinaka, Andheri want fast booking, a clean place, real service details and easy contact. This website is built around those actions with strong calls, location keywords and service-specific copy.
sections.galleryTitle: Clean Rooms, Calm Mood, Premium Feel

benefits: Direct call and WhatsApp booking from every important section
Location-focused content for Sakinaka, Andheri and nearby searches
Service pages and keyword blocks ready for SEO expansion
Fast Next.js pages with sitemap, robots and schema support

faqs.question: How can I book a spa appointment?
faqs.answer: Call or WhatsApp the number on this page and share your preferred time, service and location.

faqs.question: Do you offer full body massage in Sakinaka, Andheri?
faqs.answer: Yes, full body massage, aroma therapy, deep tissue massage, head massage and foot massage options are listed on this website.

faqs.question: Is the spa setup private and hygienic?
faqs.answer: The website highlights private rooms, trained staff and hygiene-focused service because those are important for local spa customers.

faqs.question: Can I change the website content later?
faqs.answer: Yes, service text, contact details, image URLs and keyword lists are stored in separate JSON files.
